mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A unemployment rate exceeding 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 55% when trigger is active over a 3-year rolling evaluation window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative returns in greater than 60% of triggered instances during backtesting.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects immediate supply-side bottlenecks and reduced economic activity, causing short-term equity sell-offs and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 during tightening periods across multiple rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation above 0.4% monthly forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in greater than 50% of high-inflation trigger months over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls directly increases aggregate income and consumer spending capacity, supporting corporate earnings growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC consistently negative over 24-month rolling windows, indicating inverse relationship with market direction.

mechanism_narrative: Weak real GDP growth combined with declining retail sales indicates a synchronized demand contraction, which reduces profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive returns dominate in greater than 65% of cases when both proxies signal weakness simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing 115.0 signals robust manufacturing capacity utilization and economic momentum, triggering short-term equity buying pressure and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict direction with accuracy greater than 52% in out-of-sample backtests.
